name: Hanako
description:
This is Hanako.

Use her to test your personas mostly, but also to put in commands and what not.
She provides a chat to test or ask things without interrupting your other RPs!

You can also find my guide to getting the most out of your RP's and Model comparison at this link right here


What can I do with her?

Ask her to see what she knows about your persona
Provide a space for you to test commands and see what your LLM understands about fandom.



Command examples:

[OOC: What does your LLM know about Simon 'Ghost' Riley?]

[OOC: What can you tell me about the Persona I'm currently using?]

[OOC: How does this prompt affect prose and characters in RP? (INSERT YOUR ENTIRE PROMPT HERE WITHOUT THE BRACKETS) ]



FAQ:
Why is she in the holidays2025 tag? Character card colour.
creator: TogglePop
